description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its width. The grooves are deep and create a striped pattern, giving the block a distinctive, industrial look. The block appears to be made of a dark, speckled stone, possibly granite or a similar dense material, with a rough, matte finish. The sides of the block are smooth and unadorned, contrasting with the textured top. The overall form is solid and robust, suggesting it is designed to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. There are no visible markings, engravings, or signs of significant weathering on the surface.
description: A solid, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface and smooth, dark sides. The block has a robust, industrial appearance and is made of speckled stone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the block and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the top.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth and spacing of the grooves, with the grooves running away from the viewer.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the grooves running horizontally across the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again emphasizing the length and depth of the grooves as they recede from the viewer.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a traffic or pedestrian barrier
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set flush with pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: no visible weathering; surface appears clean and well-maintained
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: aligned in a row with similar blocks to form a continuous barrier
